title: Ratpack
description: Client-side modpack of the Rat Moment, by the Rat Moment, and for the Rat Moment. Includes several utility features, general improvements, and fun changes.
body:
Client-side modpack of the Rat Moment, by the Rat Moment, and for the Rat Moment. 

The Ratpack was originally created as a resource pack, however it heavily relied on OptiFine, which is becoming increasingly obsolete. Therefore, we have decided to build a modpack using alternative mods which replicate OptiFine's resource pack features. This also opens the door to adding more performance and utility mods.

Ratpack includes:
- The Ratpack Texture Pack, which includes many fun changes and game improvements.
- Resource pack enhancement mods required for the texture pack, such as [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui), and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).
- Performance mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium), and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core).
- Utility mods such as [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap/), [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin/), and [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify).
- Other resource packs such as [Autumn Biomes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumn-biomes) and [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode).


Built off of [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) and [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/).
